channel.title: Mechanicus on Art of Dmitry Brushray
channel.description: Recent content in Mechanicus on Art of Dmitry Brushray

item.title: Dec 25 Art mix by Dmitry Brushray
item.description:
Mix of my artworks around December 2025

Metal always endures I saw a kitbash or maybe it was somethin official where the head place of a knight was taken by huge two barrels gun. I love more palsma so it just came to me to make some sort of a stationary weapon from knight leftovers which main purpose is to carry titan class plasma as a stationary canon. So I decided to experiment with this, thought people would like something unusuall.

item.title: Warhammer illustration
item.description:
In this work I was inspired by the book “Brutal Kunnin” by Mike Brooks

#warhammer40k #warhammer #warhammerart #warhammercommunity #wh40k #40k #brushray #artbrushray #orks #adeptusmechanicus #mechanicus

Like my work? Feel free to contact me ✉ for your personalized piece of art anytime!

item.title: Mechanicus 40k fan art
item.description:
Hey everybody!
In this work I was inspired by the marvellous game Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus.
The intro still makes me shiver. Adeptus Mechanicus one of my favourite topics to paint.

Like my work? Feel free to contact me ✉ for your personalized piece of art anytime!
